conditions: total >= 0, minimum >= 0, weights not empty, any(weights) is true
description: Checks if the input values meet the required conditions before proceeding with the allocation
Raises a ValueError if the total is negative
Raises a ValueError if the minimum is negative
Raises a ValueError if no weights are provided
Raises a ValueError if all weights are zero
Calculates the planned allocation for each recipient based on their weight
Converts the planned allocation to integer values for final allocation
